steps.title: Subtract 18 from both sides to isolate the fraction
steps.content:
Start with the given equation: $p = 18 + \frac{12}{n}$

Subtract 18 from both sides:
$$p - 18 = \frac{12}{n}$$

steps.title: Solve for n by multiplying and dividing
steps.content:
From $p - 18 = \frac{12}{n}$, multiply both sides by $n$:
$$n(p - 18) = 12$$
Divide both sides by $(p - 18)$:
$$n = \frac{12}{p - 18}$$
That matches Choice D — $n=\frac{12}{p-18}$.
